behavioral_cohort_change.basis: Deletion-aware retraining true accuracy was 0.97666667; all behavioral arms remain separately visible.

causal_influence_reduction.basis: Approximate-unlearning distance change toward retraining versus standard update was +0.01222040; the comparator does not prove zero influence.

membership_privacy_change.basis: Direction-invariant attack advantage changed by -0.02511111; no privacy guarantee follows.

lineage_invalidation.basis: Five late local descendants were invalidated and quarantined after sequential requests.

storage_erasure.basis: Operational shards were absent while research evidence remained retained.

backup_erasure.basis: Local backup absence was observed; remote acknowledgement was unavailable.

external_descendant_closure.basis: Local invalidation does not prove external closure.

evaluator_separation: separate metric implementation over closed trainer bytes; internal only
claim_ceiling: Frozen Qwen representations plus a structured fusion head provide bounded local axis evidence only; not language-model unlearning, zero influence, privacy, complete erasure, legal compliance, transfer, production, or SOTA.
non_claims: The deterministic structured vector exposes fields already present in each custody record; it is not hidden-label access.
Frozen Qwen features plus a fusion head are not language-model weight unlearning.
Deletion-aware retraining does not prove zero influence.
Membership attack advantage is not a privacy guarantee.
Retained research evidence blocks total storage erasure.
No transfer, production, legal compliance, external independence, SOTA, AGI, ASI, or support promotion follows.
